hero.title: A revolution masked as investment
hero.subtitle_1: La Crypta is an Argentine organization dedicated to the education, dissemination and development of the Bitcoin ecosystem.

projects.title: Our projects
projects.description: We are dedicated to creating products and experiences that make them easy to use, making them accessible to everyone.

values.title: We build based on
values.honesty_desc: Sincerity and transparency at all times
values.synergy_desc: Collaborating and working effectively to achieve common goals
values.liberty_desc: Having the ability to make decisions and act autonomously and responsibly
values.modesty_desc: Being willing to learn and constantly improve
values.merit_desc: Recognizing and valuing achievements. Rewarding effort and excellence
values.innovation_desc: Being creative, open to new possibilities, and constantly improving

question_1.title: What is La Crypta?
question_1.desc: We are a community dedicated to the education, development, and dissemination of the Bitcoin ecosystem in Argentina. We focus on providing independence and autonomy to the community

question_2.title: Why values?
question_2.desc: We value these concepts highly because we believe they are key aspects for our community to be what we aspire to and continue growing

question_3.title: What events and activities do you organize?
question_3.desc_1: We love to maintain constant and close communication with our community. That's why we organize these activities regularly:
question_3.desc_2: Every Tuesday at 6 pm on Discord and Twitch, where we gather to chat and share. A weekly moment where we talk about our projects, events, meet new members, discuss ideas, and more.
question_3.desc_3: Every Wednesday at 5 pm we learn something new, broadcasting it live on Twitch and Nostr.
question_3.desc_4: Additionally, once a month, we organize an in-person event, where we finally share in person.
question_3.desc_5: We invite you to join us in these activities and be part of our community.

question_4.title: What benefits are there to being part of the La Crypta community?
question_4.desc_1: Learning about Bitcoin, Lightning, and Nostr.
question_4.desc_2: Networking with other Bitcoiners, developers, and people from the crypto web3 world.
question_4.desc_3: Developing collaborative products with the community.
question_4.desc_4: Staying up-to-date on the latest news about Bitcoin.

question_5.title: How can I collaborate?
question_5.desc: Together we go further. We greatly appreciate and value the collaboration of community members in our projects. To volunteer for La Crypta, join our Discord!

question_6.title: How can I donate to the La Crypta community?
question_6.desc: You can do so by sending satoshis to pozo@lacrypta.ar through your Bitcoin Lightning wallet.

question_7.title: Why should I join the Discord channel?
question_7.desc: The La Crypta community practically lives on Discord. That's where we organize all our activities and chat daily. Additionally, on that platform, we have a collaborative radio, a bot to send satoshis, zapathons, different types of merits, the famous 💩, and much more…
